name: codex-preflight-skill
description: Preflight execution engine v3.1 — multi-phase structured planning with loopback gates, mandatory coverage checklists, pros/cons for every option, and anti-drift rollback

interface.shortDescription: Forces exhaustive structured planning before any code output
interface.longDescription: Codex Preflight Execution Engine v3.1. 11-phase structured workflow with: mandatory coverage checklists per phase, pros/cons for every question option, technical term explanations, explicit user-alternative invites, completeness gate with 18-item checklist, anti-drift rollback with affected-module mapping, LIGHT↔FULL mode upgrade path, and compact per-round output format. Blocks all code until USER_CONFIRMATION on full SPEC.
defaultPrompt: 我想做一个项目，帮我先梳理需求
Review this project and suggest improvements
